title: 一晚上多少钱？
description_uz: «Bir kechaga qolmoqchiman.» — mehmon va mehmonxona xodimi o'rtasidagi suhbat. Bu dialog xona so'rash, narx aytish va yo'l haqida so'rashni o'rgatadi. Tanish mavzu, sayohatda kerak bo'ladigan foydali so'zlar. Eshitish va rol o'ynash mashqi uchun mukammal.
description_ru: «Я хотел бы остаться на одну ночь.» — разговор гостя и сотрудника отеля. Этот диалог учит спрашивать о номере, называть цену и узнавать дорогу. Близкая тема, полезная лексика для путешествий. Идеально для тренировки слуха и ролевых игр.
description_en: «I'd like to stay one night.» — an exchange between a guest and a hotel clerk. This dialogue teaches asking about rooms, talking about prices, and asking for directions. Familiar topic, travel-ready vocabulary. Ideal for listening practice and role-play.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào yí ge fáng jiān.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 您好，您要单人间还是双人间？
sentences.pinyin: Nín hǎo, nín yào dān rén jiān hái shì shuāng rén jiān?
sentences.text_translation: Assalomu alaykum, sizga bir kishilik xonami yoki ikki kishilikmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Здравствуйте, вам одноместный или двухместный номер?
sentences.text_translation_en: Hello, would you like a single room or a double room?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Dān rén jiān. Yì wǎn shang duō shao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Bir kishilik. Bir kechasi qancha turadi?
sentences.text_translation_en: A single room. How much is it per night?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Sān bǎi kuài, bāo kuò zǎo cān.
sentences.text_translation: Uch yuz yuan, nonushta bilan birga.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ kàn kan fáng jiān ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Can I take a look at the room?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ. Fáng jiān zài sān lóu.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure. The room is on the third floor.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Fáng jiān lǐ yǒu wǎng luò ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is there internet in the room?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yǒu, wǎng luò shì miǎn fèi de.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, я останусь на три дня.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll stay for three days.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Qǐng gěi wǒ nín de shēn fèn zhèng.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhè shì nín de fáng kǎ, sān líng wǔ fáng jiān.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie. Jǐ diǎn tuì fáng?
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat. Soat nechada xonani bo'shatish kerak?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Zhōng wǔ shí èr diǎn yǐ qián.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ jì zhù le.
sentences.speaker: A
